strengths: Accurately reproduces the IA prompt and maintains focus throughout.
Provides clear, specific real-world context and description for the H.M. case study.
Demonstrates understanding of the open-editing model of Wikipedia and its influence on knowledge acceptance.
Includes a references section, showing awareness of the need for source attribution.
weaknesses: Commentary for the third object (IB logo) is missing or undeveloped, preventing a full justification.
Links between objects and the prompt are largely descriptive and lack deeper engagement with TOK concepts.
Evidence is anecdotal or generic; few or no primary sources are cited in the main text to support claims.
Referencing is inconsistent in format and not integrated via in-text citations, reducing clarity.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The official examinerâs total of 6 places this exhibition at the top of the 5â6 band. The student successfully identifies three objects and their contexts, clearly explains links for two of them, and provides some justification supported by evidence and references. However, the third object is not developed at all, and the analysis remains largely descriptive, lacking precision and TOK terminology. These strengths and weaknesses align with a solid performance in the 5â6 range, and although the work demonstrates key elements of the band, it does not yet achieve the clarity, depth, and consistency required for a higher mark. Thus, a final score of 6 accurately reflects the quality and distribution of achievement against the rubric.

annotations.comment: The student correctly reproduces the IA prompt, demonstrating awareness of the exhibitionâs focus.
To strengthen the introduction, the student should add a concise thesis statement linking the prompt to the three chosen objects.
Clear description of H.M.âs case provides a specific real-world context and is well presented.
The link between the doctorsâ reputations and knowledge acceptance is descriptive but lacks deeper engagement with TOK concepts.
Integrate explicit TOK terminology (e.g., authority, credibility, perspective) to develop a more nuanced analysis of H.M.âs case.
Justification of the surgical theory relies on assertion; no primary research or data is cited to substantiate the claims.
Cite specific findings from Dr. Milner and Dr. Scovilleâs published work on H.M. to support your discussion.
The explanation of Wikipediaâs context is clear and shows an understanding of its open-editing model.
The context remains generic; no specific classroom incident or teacher example illustrates rejection of Wikipedia.
Reference a specific teaching moment or assignment where Wikipedia was dismissed to ground this example in a concrete real-world context.
The unfinished sentence at the end indicates a need for proofreading and complete articulation of the argument.
Revise for clarity, ensuring each idea is fully expressed and coherent.
Object 3 (IB logo) is introduced without any accompanying analysis or explanation of its relevance.
Provide a clear justification linking the IB logo to the prompt, explaining how it influences acceptance or rejection of knowledge.
Lack of any contextual detail about the IB programme weakens the objectâs contribution.
Integrate a personal or documented experience with IB branding to illustrate how context shapes acceptance of IB knowledge.
The large blank text area suggests the student has not completed the commentary for object 3.
A references section is present, showing awareness of source attribution.
Citation entries contain inconsistent formatting and stray math notation, which undermines professionalism.
Adopt a consistent referencing style (e.g., APA) and remove irrelevant notation to enhance clarity.
References are not cited in the main text, making it unclear which claims are supported by which source.
Include parenthetical or footnote citations in commentary to clearly link evidence to your analysis.
Mixing Spanish and English titles in references reduces coherence; standardize language usage.
Ensure URLs are complete and functional, and remove extraneous line breaks to improve readability.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
